default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Homebase to discuss content strategy, AI implementation, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exploring AI chatbot calculator implementation for the hourly salary calculator page](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Discussing content quality assurance and AI detection concerns](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Planning to test a sample of articles for AI detection scores and human-written content comparison](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Ongoing projects include section refreshes, keyword incorporation, and downloadable asset development](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Ongoing Projects

  - [Section refresh flow completed for recent articles](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Planning to incorporate more long-tail keywords (list pending approval)](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Enriching existing AI articles with most deaths and infographic prompts](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Developing calculators and downloadable assets for future articles](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Creating content clusters around payroll compliance and state-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Focus on SEO-optimized content, targeting underperforming areas from 2023](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### AI Chatbot Calculator Implementation

  - [Proposed AI chatbot calculator for the hourly salary calculator page](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Concerns raised about user experience, Google's interpretation, and long-term maintenance](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Decision to proceed with testing on the existing page due to its current ranking (2nd page)](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Marcel to provide snippet for WordPress testing and feasibility analysis](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

### Content Quality Assurance and AI Detection

  - [Discussion on using AI checkers for plagiarism and AI-generated content detection](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Concerns about accuracy and potential negative impact on content quality](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Agreement to test a sample of 10-15 pieces of content through originality.ai](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Plan to compare AI-generated content scores with human-written content from Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)

### Downloadable Asset Project

  - [Kyle expressed interest in progress; Marcel to provide ideas by next week](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [Async discussion planned for earlier ideation before the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2714.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to provide AI chatbot calculator snippet for WordPress testing](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2533.0)
  - [Test AI chatbot calculator implementation on the hourly salary calculator page](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)
  - [Select 5-10 human-written Homebase articles and 10 best-performing AI-generated articles for originality score comparison](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2656.0)
  - [Marcel to share ideas for downloadable asset project asynchronously before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2751.0)
  - [Schedule one-on-one meeting between Kerry and Marcel regarding database project](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
  - [Compile list of content quality checks for Victoria's AI editing process](https://fathom.video/share/EyVxyqxUx8pWmf1bJx4HuL7zivLy73oz?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)

action_items.description: Provide initial ideas for both downloadable assets and database projects by next week's Thursday meeting
Connect with Victoria this week to discuss checklist for AI-generated content editing
Run originality scores on 10 best performing Homebase articles from last 6 months and share results with Kerry McCreadie and Sachin Ramachandra by next Thursday
